PO4-P-0.73 mg/l indicate the effect of effluent carried by

27. The increase in BOD, COD and TSS in River Kali 
East at downstream of Sugar mill drain is due to turbulent 
flow conditions contributing in higher TSS, thereby BOD 
& COD increased. The entire flow in drain was sewage. 
Direct discharge or outlet into the Sugar mill drain was 
not evident during inspection.
28. Analysis result of samples collected from Canal 
near Sugar mill shows pH- 7.9, COD- 7.0 mg/l, TSS-33 
mg/l, TDS- 122 mg/l, Chloride-46 mg/l, SO42--44 mg/l, 
NO3-N-1.3 mg/l, PO4-P-0.07 mg/l.
